## What changed

Describe the user-visible repository task or reliability boundary this change improves.

## Evidence

- Public repository or deterministic fixture used:
- Paths and commands remain source-backed:
- Screenshots or recordings for interface changes:

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:browser`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Relevant public smoke case, when repository behavior changed
- [ ] No credentials, private repository content, or generated build output committed
